title: Brand Designer Needed: Build Complete Brochure System for Architectural Products Company

Brochure Design Suite** - **Product-specific brochures (2–4 pages each):** Estimated 10–12 brochures covering ACM cladding, cabanas, pergolas, sunshades, themed structures, metal canopies, polycarbonate canopies, Signs, and decorative panels. - **Audience-specific brochures (4–6 pages each):** Four tailored brochures — Architects, General Contractors, Commercial Property Owners. - **Full Capability Brochure

title: Brochure Design for Logistics Company

title: Catalog designer needed — B2B electrical/elevator parts distributor (100+ pages)
desc: About us Beta Electrical Supply is an active wholesale distributor of electrical and elevator parts. We sell to contractors and service companies. We have a logo and a product list. We need an experienced catalog designer to rebuild our product catalog from the ground up — better than what we have, better than our competitors. They reach for our catalog when they need to spec a replacement part fast, prepare a quote, or verify Beta is a real supplier before placing a first order. They read it both in print and as a PDF on their phone in the field. Scope Full catalog redesign — roughly 100 pages, final count to be decided in kickoff. Open to a tighter, more curated version (40-60 pages) if that better suits our buyer. Front cover, back cover, intro page, Table of Contents, section dividers, product pages, reference tables (weight/amperage chart), closing page with contact info. Consistent visual system across product sections — coherent header treatment, table style, image presentation. Tables must read well in print AND on phone screens. title: Cinematic Teaser Video Creation
desc: Upwork Project Brief Cinematic Teaser Video – Major New Protect Group Australia Launch About Us Protect Group Australia & New Zealand is a rapidly growing protection technology company operating nationally across Australia and New Zealand. We specialise in advanced surface protection systems, coatings, asset preservation solutions, and aftermarket technologies across automotive, caravan, marine, industrial and fleet sectors. We are preparing to launch a major new division and product category into the Australian market and require a world-class teaser video designed to generate excitement, curiosity and anticipation. Project Objective Create a premium cinematic teaser video that announces a major upcoming launch without revealing exactly what the product, brand or opportunity is. The goal is to make viewers stop scrolling and think: "What is Protect Group bringing to Australia?" The video should create speculation, discussion and excitement while positioning Protect Group as a serious, fast-growing company making significant moves within the industry. This is not a sales advertisement. This is a brand-building teaser campaign. Video Requirements Length 45–60 seconds Formats Required 9:16 Vertical (Primary) 16:9 Landscape 1:1 Square Quality Ultra-premium Commercial-grade Cinematic

title: Cinematic Video Editor
desc: ROKIRT (rokirt.com) is a luxury real-estate investment platform. We're producing a series of cinematic montages of the Greater Yellowstone region for our private investor portal. This is the FIRST of an ongoing series — we want an editor we can rely on for many projects to come. We provide the raw footage (drone + ground, Yellowstone-area). You turn it into polished, emotionally compelling 60–90 second montages: story-driven pacing, music sync, a clean cinematic color grade, sound design, and tasteful on-brand titles. Brand guidelines, fonts, and motion-graphics assets are all provided. What you'll deliver • One finished montage per asset (typically 60–90s): web-optimized exports plus the source project file. • Color-graded, audio-mixed, and music-synced, with captions where needed. • On-brand titles and lower-thirds (motion assets supplied by our motion designer). • Up to 2 revision rounds included per asset. What we need • Expert in Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve (tell us which). • Strong cinematic color grading and audio mixing. • A reel showing luxury, real-estate, or travel-grade montage work. • Reliable turnaround and clear, proactive communication. Nice to have • Licensed-stock sourcing (any cost pre-approved by us, separately). • Basic After Effects / motion-graphics

title: Desain Poster Edukasi Minimalis
desc: Saya membutuhkan satu desain brosur atau poster bergaya minimalis yang fokus pada penyampaian informasi edukasi. title: Digital Ad Designer (Contractor)
desc: This is not a graphic design role. We produce ads at scale, to spec, for brands that measure every dollar. If your portfolio is brand decks, social posts, and print work, this isn't the right fit. If you've spent years inside ad accounts, know why a messy UGC creative beats a polished studio shot, and can deliver 15 correctly sized, correctly weighted assets from a brief without a check-in, read on. The Role We are a performance-driven agency managing paid media across Meta, Google, TikTok, and programmatic for a portfolio of brands. We're building out our production roster and need contract designers who can execute fast, think like a media buyer, and deliver assets that are built to convert, not just to impress in a PDF. You'll be briefed by our Digital Project Manager. Briefs include platform specs, mood boards, copy, and performance guidance on what actually works for that brand. Your job is to execute and communicate when something in the brief won't work. What You'll Produce Static and animated ad assets across Meta (Feed, Stories, Reels), Google Display, TikTok, programmatic, and email, delivered in all required size variations, typically 8 to 15 per concept. Platform-ready files: correct dimensions, correct file format, within spec on weight, every time, without reminders

title: Freelance Real Estate Creative — Social Media Reels, Print Mailers & Marketing Design
desc: We're a busy real estate team with Keller Williams in South Florida and we need a reliable Canva designer who can keep up with our pace. You'll be added to our Canva team account and work directly inside it — no outside files or platforms. We need Reels created for Instagram and Facebook covering listings, open houses, and market tips. We also need print mailers and postcards for just listed and just sold campaigns, static social media posts for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn, and stories, flyers, and other marketing pieces as needed. We expect first drafts within 24 hours of receiving a brief and strict brand adherence on every design. We have a brand kit set up in our Canva that must be followed at all times — black, white, gold, and red. Work should be clean, professional, and ready to post or send to print with minimal back-and-forth. You must be highly proficient in Canva. We are not looking for Adobe-only designers. Experience with real estate or luxury brands is a strong plus. This is ongoing work. If you're reliable, fast, and consistently on brand, there's long-term potential here. Please include 2 to 3 Canva-built samples with your proposal and your per-project rates for the deliverable types listed above.

title: Fun Real Estate Video Editing
desc: I shoot 15–20-minute YouTube videos that showcase local property tours, market tips, and community highlights. The footage itself is solid; what I need is an editor who can turn it into a lively, binge-worthy experience that keeps viewers watching to the very last second. Style & pacing • Overall tone: fun and engaging rather than stiff or strictly “corporate.” • Quick cuts, light jump-cuts, and tasteful zooms to keep energy high. • Colour correction and audio levelling so everything looks polished and sounds clear. Text overlays The only mandatory graphic element is strategic call-to-action text (e.g., “Book a showing,” “Subscribe for weekly tours,” “Download the market report”). These should appear at natural breaks, match my brand colours, and animate in smoothly without blocking key visuals. Optional creative touches I’m open to your ideas—subtle sound beds, whip-pan transitions, or light motion graphics—provided they support the upbeat real-estate vibe and don’t overwhelm the main content. Deliverables • One ready-to-upload 1080p (or higher) MP4 for each episode • Separate short teaser (≤60 sec) repurposed from the same timeline would be a bonus • Project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve) so I can tweak if needed • Turnaround: within 3 business days of recei

title: Graduation Cinematic Video Montage
desc: I have a folder of photos and short phone clips from the fast two years of school that I want turned into a polished, cinematic keepsake. The goal is a lively yet heartfelt edit that feels more like a short film than a simple slideshow. Here’s what I already know I want: • Overall style: cinematic with tasteful effects, modern transitions and light motion graphics to keep the energy up without looking gimmicky. • Music: an upbeat, emotional track that builds momentum and matches the celebratory mood. If you can suggest a royalty-free song, great—otherwise I’ll license one and forward it to you. • Theme: high school experience What I’ll provide • Roughly 2000 photos and videos (mostly landscape but a few vertical). • A loose chronological order and a couple of must-include shots. What I’d like back 1. A final export in 1080p (plus a 4K render if upscaling is clean). 2. One social-media-ready cut no longer than 60 seconds. 3. The editable project file (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve—whichever you use) so I can tweak titles later if needed. Acceptance checklist - Smooth color grading across all sources. - Seamless audio transitions that match on-screen action. - No watermarking; all third-party assets cleared for personal use. - Delivered via a shared drive link within

I need someone who understands professional design delivery, clear communication, deadlines, and the importance of providing editable/source files with every project. This position will be for ongoing client design work, so I am looking for someone who is accountable, friendly, professional, organized, and ready to grow with my agency. Requirements You must be able to provide: * Vector/source files for every design project when applicable * Final files organized in a ZIP folder * Two mockups included with every logo design * Mockups included for other services when applicable * Print-ready files when needed * Transparent PNGs when needed * Editable files such as AI, EPS, SVG, PDF, PSD, or Affinity files * Professional communication and timely updates * Work completed in the CST timezone Communication Communication is very important to me. I use Slack for internal communication and email for client-related work. If you cannot complete a task, meet a deadline, or need more time, I need to know ahead of time — not right before the due date. I need someone who communicates clearly, gives updates, asks questions when needed, and is honest about

title: High-End Architectural Photo Editing
desc: I'm looking for a skilled photo editor to enhance my architectural photography. Key Requirements: - Color correction - End-to-end editing, including color grading and luminosity blending - Natural and realistic style/tone Preferred Techniques: - Luminosity blending via hand blending Ideal Skills and Experience: - Expertise in architectural photo editing - Proficiency in color correction and grading - Experience with hand blending techniques - Strong attention to detail and a good eye for natural aesthetics Please provide a portfolio showcasing similar work.

title: Horticulture Company Profile With Photos
desc: I need a fresh, visually engaging company profile that I can send straight to the printer and hand out at trade shows or client meetings. Its primary job is marketing, so every page has to sell our horticulture expertise at a glance. Content • Company history and mission – a concise narrative that highlights our roots, values and long-term vision in sustainable horticulture. • Services offered – clear, persuasive copy that outlines greenhouse construction, crop consultation and turnkey project management. Imagery High-resolution, royalty-free photos are essential. Where possible, weave in shots of our nurseries, equipment in action and finished landscape projects so the reader feels the scale and quality of our work. Design & Format Print-ready, CMYK PDF (and the working file in InDesign or Illustrator) at 300 dpi, A4 size with a 3 mm bleed. Clean typography, plenty of white space and colours that echo natural greens. Acceptance criteria 1. Eight to twelve polished pages. 2. All text proof-read and aligned with UK English. 3. Image rights documented. 4. Final files pass a pre-press check (no missing fonts, links or colour-space issues). If you have a portfolio of similar brochure or profile work, especially in agriculture or horticulture, I’d like to see it before we start so we

title: LUXURY Real Estate Marketing Specialist/Designer
desc: A luxury real estate agent in Los Angeles is looking for an experienced luxury real estate marketing specialist / designer with a strong editorial eye and proven experience working with luxury real estate and luxury brands. We need someone with refined taste, clean design, and an understanding of how to market to affluent buyers and sellers. Scope of work may include: -Canva template design and creation -Social media marketing design and ideas for social media campaign -Social media post, story, and reel cover templates creation -Listing presentation design and template creation -Postcards, brochures, flyers, and email blast design and template creation -Property marketing campaign concepts -Brand consistency across digital and print materials Requirements: -Proficiency in Canva -Strong luxury / editorial aesthetic -Experience with luxury real estate branding or high-end lifestyle marketing -Experience designing for social media, email campaigns, prints and presentations -Ability to create clean, polished, sophisticated marketing materials -Must be able to follow existing brand direction while also improving the overall look and feel Please send portfolio/work samples showing: -Social media posts or social media campaigns -Listing presentations -Postcards / brochures / flyers -Em

title: Landing Pages and Flyers Creation
desc: We are seeking a freelancer to create landing pages with QR codes for a real estate office and design flyers using Canva. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and web design, with a focus on creating visually appealing and functional landing pages. Additionally, the ability to create engaging flyers with Canva is essential. This is a part-time project with a short duration, perfect for entry-level freelancers looking to build their portfolio.

title: Lead-Generating Real Estate Facebook Posts
desc: I’m looking for someone who can take over my Facebook feed and turn it into a steady source of qualified real-estate leads. Every week I want to publish a balanced mix of: • Fresh property listings written in buyer-friendly language and paired with eye-catching images or short reels • Bite-sized market insights and trends that position me as the local expert • Practical home-improvement tips that keep homeowners engaged until they’re ready to sell or buy Your posts should be optimized for Facebook’s current algorithm, include clear calls to action, and reflect a consistent brand voice. Captions, hashtags, basic graphic design, and scheduling in Meta Business Suite are all part of the job. I’ll supply raw listing details, recent stats, and any brand assets you need; you handle the creative spin, formatting, and timely publication. Acceptance criteria: 1. A 4-week content calendar (12–15 posts) delivered in Google Sheets. 2. All graphics sized correctly for Facebook feed. 3. Captions free of grammar errors and containing at least one CTA that funnels leads to my website or Messenger. 4. Scheduled posts visible in my Meta queue at least 48 hours before they go live. If this sounds like something you can execute smoothly, let’s talk timing and next steps.

title: Lead-Generating Real Estate Video Reels
desc: I need a steady flow of Facebook-ready property tour videos that are crafted to turn viewers into qualified buyer or seller leads. Every reel should highlight the home’s best angles, walk prospects through key spaces, and finish with a clear call-to-action that pushes them to message, click, or book a showing. Key features to build into each video • Voice-over narration that quickly tells the story of the property • On-screen text descriptions for room dimensions, amenities, and contact prompts • Background music that matches the pace and feel of the home I’ll supply raw footage (or coordinate a filming schedule if you prefer to shoot). You handle editing, color correction, motion graphics, captions, royalty-free music, and final export in the correct aspect ratios for Facebook Feed, Stories, and Reels. Success for me looks like: a consistent aesthetic across all clips, files delivered in MP4/H.264, compelling hooks in the first three seconds, and videos short enough to keep engagement yet detailed enough to spark inquiries. Let’s create a package of scroll-stopping tours that converts Facebook traffic into real appointments.

title: Letterhead and Business Card Design
desc: Looking for an experienced designer to create a premium corporate stationery and branding package for a construction/engineering company. Scope includes: * Letterhead * Business cards * Invoice & quotation templates * Email signature * Proposal/company profile templates Style required: * Modern * Corporate * Minimal * Geometric / architectural feel * Premium blue & white branding Must use professional tools such as: * Adobe InDesign * Illustrator * Figma Deliverables must include: * Editable source files * Print-ready files * Word-compatible versions where needed Please share relevant portfolio examples of premium corporate branding/stationery work.

title: Lifestyle Shorts Editor Needed
desc: Any generic automatic response will be ignored. Your bid will be what you will charge per video, ie $15. I want someone who will use consistent branding/text/etc so every video has the same type of feel. I'm a realtor who plans to do 20 posts per month and want a reliable partner to turn raw footage into scroll-stopping shorts for Instagram, TikTok, FB and YouTube. Each video will run 15–60 seconds, cut vertically (9:16), with upbeat pacing, on-trend music, and burn-in captions. Smooth jump cuts, punchy zooms, and colour-consistent grading are essential so the feed feels cohesive across all three platforms. You’ll receive organised folders with talking-head segments, B-roll, and a reference mood board. The edited file (ProRes or H.264) plus the project file from Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci, or CapCut is returned within 48 hours. To move forward, send a brief yet detailed proposal outlining: • Your creative approach to lifestyle edits, specifically real estate. • Sample links that show mastery of vertical short-form storytelling • Turnaround capacity per week and preferred software This is an ongoing collaboration, so the proposal should make it easy for me to see how you can keep quality high as volume scales.

The animation should utilise elements already present within the logo, including: Stars / sparkles Lightning bolts Wordmark Dumfries & Galloway banner Potential movements could include: Twinkling stars Lightning flashes Individual letter reveals Banner movement Light trails Subtle bounce and settling motion Gentle looping animation for website use We are open to creative interpretation and welcome ideas from the designer. title: Logo Design for Landscaping Company
desc: We are looking for someone to convert our already designed logo from .png format into a vector file format good to use for trucks. We need it in .ai format, 3D so truck logo companies can use it. We would like one version in black and one in white background, exactly like how they are attached.

desc: I am launching VEYLMONT, a premium menswear brand based in Bengaluru, India. Our flagship product is a high-quality Oxford Cloth Button-Down (OCBD) shirt inspired by timeless menswear brands. title: Luxury Property Management Brochure Design
desc: We are seeking a skilled designer to create a professional layout for a luxury property management brochure. The design should be visually appealing and align with our brand's high standards. The final product will be a PDF, so experience with graphic design software is essential. This is a part-time project with a short duration, ideal for someone with intermediate proficiency.

title: Marketing
desc: Marketing Graphic Designer (Canva) – Ongoing Work We are looking for a reliable graphic designer to support multiple brands in the construction, building products, and commercial equipment industries. Projects include: • Sales flyers • Social media graphics • Product brochures • Trade show materials • Promotional campaigns • Price sheets • Email marketing graphics • Website graphics Industries include: • Windows & Doors • Interior Cabinetry & Storage Systems • Commercial Cold Storage & Refrigeration We already have logos, branding, product photos, and examples of the style we like. title: Marketing Admin
desc: About Us MHP Value is a nationwide commercial real estate brokerage specializing in mobile home parks and RV parks. We are a fast-growing company with established marketing systems, training videos, templates, and step-by-step procedures already in place. We are not looking for a marketing agency, strategist, or consultant. We are looking for someone who can follow detailed processes, execute tasks accurately, and help ensure our marketing content is published consistently and on time. Position Overview We are seeking a detail-oriented Marketing Coordinator to assist with the execution of our existing marketing processes. You will not be responsible for creating marketing strategy, developing campaigns from scratch, or reinventing our systems. Instead, your role will be to follow our documented procedures and training videos to create and publish marketing content using our existing templates. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys organization, consistency, and executing established workflows.
